title: ShetiPhianCore
body:
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/oX7uP2kS/images/99494d45b8a8e11ea8f13ab5a316559a98432805.png)

This is the core classes all my Forge mods use. It must be installed or my mods will crash.

Mods using this core:
- EnderChests [Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderchests)
- EnderTanks [Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/endertanks)
- MultiBeds [Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/multibeds)
- Platforms [Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/platforms)
- Terraqueous [Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/terraqueous)



Bug Reports, Feature Requests, and Localizations are accepted here: [GitHub Project](https://github.com/ShetiPhian/Localizations-and-Issues)
